recentNotes.note: P3-S1 accepted after backend foundation validation and review; apps/api now exposes a Fastify app factory and runtime starter with health checks, structured error handling, logging hooks, config bootstrapping, and placeholder service wiring for auth, AI, planner, and Freshful modules.

P2-S3 accepted after config validation and review; the repo now has placeholder-only env templates, backend and mobile runtime config loaders with server/client secret separation, and workspace docs covering Google auth, Anthropic, DB, and Freshful settings.

P2-S2 accepted after persistence validation and review; apps/api now has PostgreSQL schema, Drizzle migrations, local compose config, and tested ownership-safe persistence tables for users, profiles, plans, shopping lists, products, and cached search results.

P2-S1 accepted after schema validation and review; @freshful/contracts now exports shared zod schemas and types for onboarding profiles, meal plans, Freshful products, shopping lists, and API error payloads.
P1-S3 accepted after workflow validation and review; root lint, test, format policy, env bootstrap, and startup commands are now defined for the scaffolded monorepo.
P1-S2 accepted after scaffold validation and review; npm workspaces now cover apps/api, apps/mobile, and packages/contracts with runtime-consumable shared package wiring.
P1-S1 accepted after coder implementation, tester validation, and reviewer approval; architecture stack note added in docs/architecture/p1-s1-workspace-stack.md.
